summary: The video shows a vehicle traveling on a two-lane road with trees lining both sides. A dark-colored SUV is ahead in the right lane. The road appears wet, suggesting recent rainfall. As the vehicle approaches an intersection, a white sedan overtakes it from the left side.

events_timeline.event: A dark-colored SUV travels steadily along the right lane.
A white sedan overtakes the SUV from the left.

uncertainties: Exact speed of the vehicles cannot be determined.
Precise location of the intersection is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of a collision or hazardous behavior.
